svg.title: TradersApp - Architecture Operating Map
svg.desc: Current operating map answering what, how, why, where, and who for the major architecture lanes.
svg.text: Architecture operating map
Read this as current-state operating intent, not as a target-state promise.
Lane
What
How
Why
Where
Who
Request path
CURRENT
Frontend -> BFF -> analysis-service -> ML Engine
This is the live serving path for consensus work.
HTTP at the edge, gRPC on the seam, HTTP /predict behind the seam today.
Keep the user-facing contract stable while extraction continues behind it.
Browser, BFF, analysis-service, ML Engine, Redis, Feast.
Trader traffic, BFF owner, analysis owner.
Learning loop
PARTIAL
Training, drift checks, DQ gates, registry, artifacts
The capability exists, but validation depth differs by environment.
Airflow DAGs, Great Expectations, MLflow, Kafka, MinIO, PostgreSQL.
Promote models through checks instead of pushing directly from code changes.
ml-engine modules, Airflow workflows, MLOps services.
ML operator, platform owner, data-quality owner.
Observability
PARTIAL
Metrics, logs, traces, alerts, dashboards
The stack is defined in-repo; live signal coverage still needs proving in every target environment.
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Jaeger, OTEL wiring, rules, dashboards.
Catch latency, drift, retrain failure, and deploy regressions early.
Across runtime services and cluster support services.
Platform operator and service owners.
Delivery + secrets
MIXED
Build, test, deploy, inject secrets
The repo still carries both public-cloud and self-hosted operating stories.
GitHub Actions plus Railway/Vercel current; Gitea/Woodpecker plus Helm/k3s partial.
Avoid drift and make environment claims explicit instead of implied.
CI workflows, Helm charts, k8s docs, setup and deployment docs.
Developer, platform owner, release owner.
Boundary reality
CURRENT
Only analysis is physically extracted today
Ingestion and learning are bounded contexts before they are separate runtimes.
Keep contracts stable first; move behavior out in slices later.
This lowers blast radius and stops premature service sprawl.
analysis-service live; ingestion and learning still mostly inside ml-engine.
Architecture owner, BFF owner, ML owner.
